security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Language server install manager for multi-language codebases
bundle.longDescription: LSP-IO detects project languages, recommends language servers, manages app-owned installs, reports status, and removes managed servers without touching system toolchains.
